narrative:
West Chester Twp 15 (precinct in Butler County) has 984 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.2 percentage points.
